openrouter-fusion.name: openrouter-fusion
openrouter-fusion.description: Multi-model deliberation 'rescue' answers via OpenRouter Fusion: a panel of models answers in parallel (with web search/fetch), then a judge synthesizes consensus, contradictions and blind spots into one best answer. Named configs (Quality / Budget / Custom) with per-config reasoning effort & temperature; an async start/poll flow so long deliberations never hit a client timeout.

examples.title: List the available configs
examples.description: Show every Fusion config (quality, budget, and any custom ones) with its panel, judge, reasoning effort and temperature.

examples.title: Start a quality deliberation
examples.description: Run the frontier panel (Opus + GPT + Gemini, judge Opus) in the background and get a job id.
examples.prompt: Use Fusion (quality) to explain the trade-offs between ridge, lasso and elastic net.

examples.title: Fetch the result
examples.description: Long-poll the job id returned by fusion_start until the synthesized answer is ready.
examples.prompt: Get the Fusion result for job_id fj_xxx.

npm.description: Runs server.mjs straight from the public GitHub repo via npx (no npm publish required). Custom configs are added as extra OPENROUTER_FUSION_<NAME> env vars.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Your OpenRouter API key. MUST be an inference key with credit (a provisioning/management key returns 401 'User not found'). Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys

OPENROUTER_FUSION_CODE.description: Optional. A named custom config, as a JSON object. One env var per config: OPENROUTER_FUSION_<NAME> registers a config named <name>. Built-in configs 'quality' and 'budget' need no env var. Fields: analysis_models (panel), judge (orchestrator), reasoning_effort (xhigh|high|medium|low|minimal|none), temperature (null = model default), optional system.

OPENROUTER_FUSION_DEFAULT_REASONING.description: Optional. Global default reasoning effort applied to any config that doesn't set its own. Defaults to 'high'.

tools.name: fusion_list
tools.description: List the available Fusion configs (name, label, panel, judge, reasoning_effort, temperature, description). Call this first when the user wants to use Fusion but hasn't picked a config.

tools.name: fusion_start
tools.description: Start an OpenRouter Fusion deliberation in the background and return a job_id immediately (never times out). Pick a config with preset:'<name>' (default: quality). reasoning_effort and temperature default to the config's; override per call.

prompt.description: The question or task to deliberate on.

preset.description: Config name from fusion_list (quality, budget, or a custom one). Default: quality.

temperature.description: Override the config's sampling temperature (omit = config/model default).

analysis_models.description: Override the config's panel (1-8 OpenRouter model slugs).

tools.name: fusion_result
tools.description: Fetch the result of a fusion_start job. Long-polls ~45s: returns the synthesized answer when ready, or {status:'running'} (call again with the same job_id).
